name: Garlicky Baked Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the tomatoes and cut them in half horizontally.
2. Gently squeeze out the juice and seeds.
3. Arrange the tomato halves, cut side up, in a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
4. Drizzle with oil.
5. Bake uncovered at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, combine garlic, parsley, bread crumbs, and pepper in a small bowl.
7. Sprinkle the mixture over the tomatoes.
8. Continue baking uncovered for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Makes 6 to 8 servings. An easy and elegant side dish.
